text: SSH remote required for workflow scope — HTTPS lacks workflow scope for pushing GitHub Actions files
.gitignore must use /telesis (anchored) not telesis — otherwise matches src/ paths
bop v0.8.4 with private repo install via BOP_GITHUB_TOKEN is the working version
Agent layer lives under src/agent/ — direct imports, no subprocess boundary

Work adoption issues created: #113 (GHE support), #114 (Jira intake), #115 (Confluence ingestion), #116 (monorepo support), #117 (TUI framework), #118 (TUI intake view), #119 (TUI pipeline view). Phased: v0.32 GHE+Jira, v0.33 monorepo, v0.34-35 TUI.

Atlassian integration decision: native REST clients, not MCP-dependent. Telesis daemon/orchestrator must call Jira/Confluence without Claude Code. Hosted MCP tools (mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__*) are fine for ad-hoc exploration but not a core dependency.

Monorepo blocker: src/hooks/install.ts assumes .git/ is co-located with .telesis/. In a monorepo, .git/ is at repo root while .telesis/ is per-service. ensureGitRepo() throws. Fix: discover git root by walking upward, separate from .telesis/ discovery.
